description.name: Sunny Central Studio
description.headline: Spacious 2-Bedroom Apartment in the Heart of Lisbon!
description.description: Stay in the middle of everything! This bright, cozy studio is perfect for a couple exploring Lisbon. The compact layout makes the most of every corner, with a kitchenette and a comfortable double sofa bed. Steps from Rossio square, trams and tascas.

reviews: Great location, you can walk everywhere. The studio is small and a bit tight for luggage but has everything two people need for a few nights.
Compact but well laid out and very central. Note it's a studio, not separate bedrooms, despite the listing title.

policies.cancellation_policy: Free cancellation up to 5 days before check-in.
